subtasks.description: Query license database to group licenses by publisher, computing total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses per publisher

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single aggregation query with GROUP BY on a single source. No cross-source reconciliation needed. A small-tier SQL generator can handle the straightforward multi-aggregate (SUM, AVG, COUNT) grouping operation. One subtask is sufficient—all metrics are computed in a single SQL statement to avoid unnecessary query duplication.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) as total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) as avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) as license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
